title: Online Doctors and Appointments
content: To connect to online doctors, patients can use the XCare hotline at 1900 1234. For any inquiries regarding our services, working hours, or to review available medical packages, please visit our official website at www.xcare.com.

title: Feedback and Complaints
content: To report bad services, unfriendly staff, long wait times, or to provide general feedback, please send an email to feedback@hotmail.com.

title: Hospital Locations
content: XCare has multiple physical locations. Location 1 is at 123 Norway District 1, Saigon City. Location 2 is at 222 Norway District 2, Saigon City. Location 3 is at 321 Norway District 3, Saigon City.
